org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf

Class PdfTeXGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.vector.AbstractVectorGraphics2D
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf.PdfGraphics2D
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf.PdfTeXGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ViewGraphics2D

    public class PdfTeXGraphics2D
extends PdfGraphics2D
    This graphic context permits to create a PDF file with combined TeX macros, from a graphic context.

    This exporter supports the PDF 1.4 Reference Document.

    Since:
    15.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • prolog

        public void prolog()
            throws IOException
        Description copied from class: AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
        Invoked to export the prolog for the target format. This function should be overridden by subclasses to export a prolog into the target document.
        Overrides:
        prolog in class PdfGraphics2D
        Throws:
        IOException

        y - is the position of the text
        str - is the string to draw.
        color - is the color of the text
